revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - flag correction, sources checked and confirmed
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23367905411|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Russian Empire | shortname alias = Russia | flag alias = Flag of Russia.svg | flag alias-1858 = Romanov Flag.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Russia.svg | link alias-naval = Imperial Russian Navy | link alias-army = Imperial Russian Army | border-air force = | flag alias-air force = Russian Imperial Air force flash.svg | link alias-air force = Imperial Russian Air Service | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Russia.svg | link alias-navy = Imperial Russian Navy | link alias-football = Russian Empire national football team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1858 | related1 = Russia | related2 = Russian SFSR </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Russian_Empire here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Russian_Empire for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Russian Empire | shortname alias = Russia | flag alias = Flag of Russia.svg | flag alias-1858 = Romanov Flag.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Russia.svg | link alias-naval = Imperial Russian Navy | link alias-army = Imperial Russian Army | border-air force = | flag alias-air force = Russian Imperial Air force flash.svg | link alias-air force = Imperial Russian Air Service | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Russia.svg | link alias-navy = Imperial Russian Navy | link alias-football = Russian Empire national football team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1858 | related1 = Russia | related2 = Russian SFSR </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
